prerequisites.value:
Handle Animal 4 ranks; Ride 4 ranks; divine bond (mount), hunter’s bond ( animal companion ), or mount class feature with an effective druid level of 4.

Diplomacy, Intimidate, or Handle Animal 5 ranks; Ride 5 ranks. Starting Statistics Size Large; Speed 30 ft., fly 40 ft. (average; unable to carry a rider while flying); AC +4 natural armor; Attack bite (1d6); Ability Scores Str 16, Dex 15, Con 16
